creator: msa@latt.net
text:
On Wed, Jun 05, 2013 at 10:08:27PM +0300, Alexander Motin wrote:
> It could help if you provided some more information about the issue,
> for example verbose kernel messages recorded in some way. IIRC I've
> tested non-ATA_CAM kernel after 9.1 release, and it worked fine for
> me.

	Sorry for the delay:

	I updated to 9.1-RELEASE-p3, and can no longer reproduce the
problem.

	Put this one on hold for now, I'll see if I can find a way to
reproduce it with newer kernels.

	Thanks!

	--msa
